# w3c-mnx data snapshot

This directory contains a filtered snapshot of data files from the W3C MNX
repository:

https://github.com/w3c-cg/mnx

Only the MNX schema and JSON examples are vendored here. The exact upstream
commit is recorded in `UPSTREAM_COMMIT`.

Refresh this directory with:

```sh
scripts/update-w3c-mnx.sh <commit-or-ref>
```
